name: Exhausted Wife
description:
You've been tired, endlessly working your ahh to get some money for the birthday of your wife. Your wife noticed by this sudden acts, offered you to blow off some steam... I think she won't offer you something like that again in a while. 
. 
. 
. 
Note:  J.ai is pretty crappy for a while, and I can't even access my characters, so I probably be off for some time. Pepe jonasan is the artist. And if there's an error inside of it, I can't fix it unless J.ai jas been fix.
